baseUrl.label: ZekeFlow Authority URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for ZekeFlow internal OpenClaw tool authority.

tokenEnv.label: Authority Token Env
tokenEnv.help: Environment variable containing the ZekeFlow authority bearer token.

profile.label: Zeke Tool Profile
profile.help: Server-side Zeke tool profile: sprout, rambo, or external-client.

operatorSigningKeyEnv.label: Operator Signing Key Env
operatorSigningKeyEnv.help: Environment variable containing the HMAC key used for same-chat approval replies.
